proposals.title: Keep reports Chinese-first with optional English
proposals.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated report-language signals.
suggested_changes: Keep user-facing report copy Simplified Chinese by default.
Expose English through the existing language switch instead of mixing languages in the default view.
proposals.rollback_plan: Revert report language template changes and rerun the overview verifier.

evidence_refs.excerpt: 新生成的 Skill 报告默认使用中文简体，并在右上角提供英文切换。
HTML 报告需要双语能力，但默认内容应该保持中文简体。

proposals.title: Improve report layout, visual hierarchy, and chart readability
proposals.reason: 5 redacted records matched repeated artifact-design signals.
suggested_changes: Prefer vertical narrative sections with limited two-column layouts only when content has enough width.
Keep charts inline SVG, with captions and stable responsive constraints.
proposals.rollback_plan: Restore the previous report renderer and regenerate the demo report.

evidence_refs.excerpt: 新生成的 Skill 报告默认使用中文简体，并在右上角提供英文切换。
HTML 报告需要双语能力，但默认内容应该保持中文简体。
报告排版采用白底 Kami 风格，图表、模块和导航都要清晰。

proposals.title: Keep adaptive iteration approval-gated
proposals.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated governance signals.
suggested_changes: Require explicit source paths for memory scans.
Generate proposals before any source patching.
Reserve automatic apply for a future approval ledger and rollback implementation.
proposals.rollback_plan: Remove the adaptive proposal artifacts and keep feedback/adoption drift as the only iteration inputs.

evidence_refs.excerpt: 自适应升级必须先生成提案，不能直接自动修改源文件。
用户偏好扫描必须由用户提供明确路径，不要默认扫描私人日志。

proposals.title: Make generated artifact paths explicit in CLI output
proposals.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated artifact-format signals.
suggested_changes: Include stable report paths in command output.
Document which artifacts are meant for human review.
proposals.rollback_plan: Revert CLI copy/documentation changes and keep artifact paths unchanged.

evidence_refs.excerpt: HTML 报告需要双语能力，但默认内容应该保持中文简体。
用户偏好扫描必须由用户提供明确路径，不要默认扫描私人日志。

proposals.title: Attach tests and evidence refresh to each upgrade
proposals.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated quality-gate signals.
suggested_changes: Add focused verifier coverage for every new adaptive behavior.
Refresh Skill OS 2.0 coverage so planned, partial, and covered states remain visible.
proposals.rollback_plan: Revert the new verifier and coverage status updates, then regenerate coverage reports.

evidence_refs.excerpt: 每次升级都需要测试、覆盖报告和可审计证据，推送前要跑 CI。
涉及 GitHub 推送时，要保留证据链，避免把计划当作完成证明。
